title: SCVM Skill / Playbook Frontmatter
description: Contract for the YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md (core skill or org playbook). Designed to be compatible with the stock Agent Skills frontmatter (name, description, metadata, allowed-tools, compatibility, license) while permitting a migration_status escape hatch for assets carrying extended (e.g. gstack) frontmatter that has not yet been normalized. Custom fields belong under metadata.

name.description: Kebab-case skill name. MUST match the containing folder name.

description.description: When to invoke the skill and what it produces, including natural-language triggers.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata. Put any custom/extended fields here to validate cleanly. SCVM additions live here too.

stateless.description: True for reusable core capabilities with no domain-specific state.

migration_status.description: native = passes stock agentskills validate. preserved-extended-frontmatter = imported as-is (e.g. gstack) and intentionally not edited. needs-normalization = scheduled to be brought to native.

allowed-tools.description: Stock Agent Skills field. Tools the skill is permitted to use.
